inventory_note: Inventory of all currently supplied Abyssal Surge media assets. Provenance is stated only where observed or supplied; pre-existing transition renderer details remain unrecorded.

assets.derivation: Original Abyssal Surge ambient sound asset; prompt text is not stored in this manifest.
Original Abyssal Surge lobby theme: dark orchestral drone with restrained choir swell, generated for a seamless 22s loop.

Original Abyssal Surge battle theme: grand dark epic orchestral battle underscore, thunderous war drums, soaring desperate strings, distant wordless choir rising into brass fanfare, relentless militant rhythm section; generated for a seamless 22s loop.

assets.generated_by: Local deterministic procedural synthesis via scripts/generate_game_audio.py (cue_id=breach-alert)
assets.derivation: Prompt: Original Abyssal Surge breach alarm: urgent abyssal siren, three warning pulses, one low hull-strike impact. No speech, no borrowed melody. Procedure: 44.1 kHz mono PCM; swept 620 Hz siren with second harmonic, 92 Hz sub pulse, deterministic xorshift noise grit, attack/release envelope; MP3 128 kbps.

assets.generated_by: Local deterministic procedural synthesis via scripts/generate_game_audio.py (cue_id=wave-spawn)
assets.derivation: Prompt: Original Abyssal Surge wave-spawn signal: fast spectral rise, portal impact, short metallic confirmation tone. No speech, no borrowed melody. Procedure: 44.1 kHz mono PCM; quadratic 110-420 Hz chirp, 68 Hz exponential portal impact, 740 Hz confirmation partial, deterministic xorshift noise; MP3 128 kbps.

Regenerated Abyssal Surge Korean stage4 narration through the Daniel ElevenLabs path (stability 0.4, style 0.75 for a grand, voice-acted dark-fantasy performance) from canonical source text: "가라앉은 보루, 선큰 바스티온. 조수의 감시자를 방파제 아래로 가라앉혀라."

Regenerated Abyssal Surge Korean stage5 narration through the Daniel ElevenLabs path (stability 0.4, style 0.75 for a grand, voice-acted dark-fantasy performance) from canonical source text: "울부짖는 폐허, 하울링 스프롤. 무리의 감시자를 빙의해 전령의 목을 조여라."

Regenerated Abyssal Surge Korean stage6 narration through the Daniel ElevenLabs path (stability 0.4, style 0.75 for a grand, voice-acted dark-fantasy performance) from canonical source text: "유리 묘역, 글래스 네크로폴리스. 두 유리 단상을 점거하고 진혼의 합창을 끊어라."

Regenerated Abyssal Surge Korean stage7 narration through the Daniel ElevenLabs path (stability 0.4, style 0.75 for a grand, voice-acted dark-fantasy performance) from canonical source text: "별 없는 운하, 스타리스 커낼. 군주의 영역을 다시 열어 폭군의 등불을 모두 꺼라."

Regenerated Abyssal Surge Korean stage8 narration through the Daniel ElevenLabs path (stability 0.4, style 0.75 for a grand, voice-acted dark-fantasy performance) from canonical source text: "부서진 둑길, 섀터드 코즈웨이. 다리를 지키는 거상을 육교 아래로 무너뜨려라."

Regenerated Abyssal Surge Korean stage9 narration through the Daniel ElevenLabs path (stability 0.4, style 0.75 for a grand, voice-acted dark-fantasy performance) from canonical source text: "심연 예배당, 어비스 챈슬. 세 의식 단상을 모두 점거하고 봉인 계약을 깨뜨려라."

Regenerated Abyssal Surge Korean stage10 narration through the Daniel ElevenLabs path (stability 0.4, style 0.75 for a grand, voice-acted dark-fantasy performance) from canonical source text: "게이트 제니스, 마지막 정점. 모든 가호를 걸고 심연의 섭정을 지워라. 오늘, 문을 닫는다."

assets.generated_by: Local deterministic procedural synthesis via scripts/generate_game_audio.py (cue_id=boss-phase-change)
assets.derivation: Prompt: Original Abyssal Surge boss phase change: brittle armor fracture, descending abyssal sub impact, one cold teal confirmation partial. No speech, no borrowed melody. Procedure: 44.1 kHz mono PCM; 58 Hz descending impact, 310 Hz fracture burst, 1.8 kHz confirmation partial, deterministic xorshift grit; MP3 128 kbps.

Original Abyssal Surge battle theme for the drowned depths (stages 4-6): grand dark orchestral underscore with tidal sub-bass swells, deep taiko-like war drums, mournful cello/viola ostinato, distant submerged choir, brass stabs; generated for a seamless 22s loop.

Original Abyssal Surge battle theme for the shattered causeways (stages 7-8): grand dark orchestral underscore, tolling cathedral bells, cracking stone percussion, rising string tremolo, heroic brass motif; generated for a seamless 22s loop.

Original Abyssal Surge final battle theme for the abyssal zenith (stages 9-10): grand dark epic orchestral finale, full wordless choir chanting a ritual chorus, thunderous war drums and taiko, climactic brass fanfare; generated for a seamless 22s loop.
